title: Palash
overview: Samjhana,a middle class village girl wishes to marry a rich guy which later leads her to be sold at a brothel. The sweetness of her lover back from her village and the harshness of the brothel owner, after she's drowned into prostitution, are the major emotional ingredients of the movie.
